summary: Deep research complete on real-time satellite collision insurance marketplace. Spec defines OrbitShield: a SaaS collision risk dashboard (Phase 1) + Stripe-powered hourly micro-coverage marketplace (Phase 2). Stack: Next.js + Express + PostgreSQL + Stripe Meters API + LSTM ML model. Data sources: CelesTrak TLE, Space-Track CDM, NOAA SWPC, ESA DISCOS. 7-table Postgres schema, 18 API endpoints, 6 screens. Ready for implementation.
blockers: Space-Track account registration required for CDM access
Insurance partner (MGA/surplus lines) must be secured before Phase 2 coverage sales
ML model training requires historical CDM dataset collection
recommended_next_steps: Begin historical CDM data collection for ML training
